label: National Cancer Institute
license_summary: U.S. government text is reusable unless otherwise indicated; credit NCI.
default_subset_notes: Oncology diagnosis, treatment, risk, PDQ/dictionary pages where source terms permit.

label: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention
license_summary: Most CDC/ATSDR website text is public domain; page-level exceptions may apply.
default_subset_notes: Infectious disease, public health, vaccination, sepsis, diabetes, and prevention pages.

label: U.S. Food and Drug Administration
license_summary: FDA website text and graphics are public domain unless otherwise noted.
default_subset_notes: Drug safety, medication guides, FDA consumer and professional drug-safety pages.

label: National Institute of Diabetes and Digestive and Kidney Diseases
license_summary: Most NIDDK text is copyright-free; page-level exceptions may apply.
default_subset_notes: Diabetes, kidney disease, GI disease, endocrine and nutrition education pages.

label: NCBI Bookshelf / NLM LitArch Open Access subset
license_summary: Automated retrieval is permitted only through the NLM LitArch FTP service; licenses vary by package and must be preserved.
default_subset_notes: Use fetch-bookshelf-oa with bounded book/package filters and retain package license metadata.

label: Human Phenotype Ontology
license_summary: Freely available ontology files; acknowledge/cite HPO, display file version/date, and do not alter HPO content or logical relationships.
default_subset_notes: Use fetch-obo-ontology; phenotype terms, synonyms, definitions, xrefs, hierarchy, and rare-disease diagnostic phenotype language.

label: Mondo Disease Ontology
license_summary: CC BY 4.0 disease ontology; attribution and license notice required.
default_subset_notes: Use fetch-obo-ontology; harmonized disease labels, synonyms, definitions, xrefs, and disease hierarchy for research/clinical query expansion.

label: Merck Manual Professional Edition
license_summary: Copyrighted; default terms do not permit public bulk reuse.
default_subset_notes: Private/licensed deployment only; use ingest-tabular-corpus for locally supplied permitted excerpts.

label: MSD Manual Professional Edition
license_summary: Copyrighted; default terms do not permit public bulk reuse.
default_subset_notes: Private/licensed deployment only; use ingest-tabular-corpus for locally supplied permitted excerpts.

label: American Academy of Family Physicians
license_summary: Copyrighted; default terms grant personal non-commercial access and require permission for reuse.
default_subset_notes: Private/licensed deployment only; do not include in public artifacts without permission.

label: Medscape
license_summary: Copyrighted; terms prohibit scraping and unpermitted content reuse.
default_subset_notes: Private/licensed deployment only; do not include in public artifacts without permission.

label: BMJ Best Practice
license_summary: Copyrighted subscription clinical decision-support content; use only with BMJ license/API.
default_subset_notes: Private/licensed deployment only; high-value differential, diagnosis, and treatment algorithms.

label: NICE Clinical Knowledge Summaries
license_summary: CKS is third-party Agilio/Clarity Informatics content and is not NICE open content; EULA/permission required for reuse.
default_subset_notes: Private/licensed deployment only; UK primary-care diagnostic and management summaries.

label: NCBI Bookshelf StatPearls
license_summary: Bookshelf terms vary by title; StatPearls is typically CC BY-NC-ND 4.0, unsuitable for derived public vector artifacts without review/permission.
default_subset_notes: Do not systematically fetch Bookshelf pages; only ingest allowed Open Access subset or locally permitted excerpts with per-chapter license metadata.

label: Patient.info Professional Reference
license_summary: Copyrighted; terms prohibit extraction for structured medical knowledge, clinical guidance, decision support, datasets, or AI/ML without permission.
default_subset_notes: Private/licensed deployment only; clinician-reviewed UK/NHS/NICE-oriented reference content.

label: GPnotebook
license_summary: Copyrighted; limited personal/non-commercial reference use and no copying, monitoring, or automated extraction without permission.
default_subset_notes: Private/licensed deployment only; concise primary-care reference pages.

label: WikEM
license_summary: CC BY-SA medical wiki with automated access and AI/ML restrictions; derived artifacts require attribution/share-alike and permission where terms require it.
default_subset_notes: Do not include in default public rebuild; consider only with explicit permission or compliant CC BY-SA artifact strategy.
